common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this call to register a brand.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: The information you queried is not found.

error_list.name: unsupport_region_for_register_brand
error_list.description: The market this shop belongs to do not support brand registration.

error_list.name: error_busi_duplicated
error_list.description: Brand already exists. If you want to add available category for this brand, you can change the category.

error_list.name: error_busi_pending_qc
error_list.description: The brand you registered is in the inspection process. Please contact Shopee Customer Service for more information.

error_list.name: error_busi_blacklist
error_list.description: This brand name can't be used in several selected categories. You can contact Shopee CS for brand appeal offline if need.

error_list.name: error_busi_blacklist_need_license
error_list.description: Risky brand name, please provide related license and brand registration website to register this specific brand.

request_params.name: category_list
request_params.description: Category_id list for this brand, please input category in L1 or L2. Max input num of category_id is 50.

children.name: image_id_list
children.description: Image Id of product image for this brand, max input num of file = 10 ,each file's length<=498. ID market is optional.

request_params.name: app_logo_image_id
request_params.description: Image_id  of logo for  app client,please input hashcode of this picture.

request_params.name: brand_description
request_params.sample: Our mission is what drives us to do everything possible to expand human potential. We do that by creating groundbreaking sport innovations, by making our products more sustainably, by building a creative and diverse global team and by making a positive impact in communities where we live and work
request_params.description: The description of this brand, can input the information, length<=254.

request_params.name: additional_information
request_params.sample: additional notes or comment can seller can add
request_params.description: Additional notes or comment can seller can add, length<=254.

request_params.name: pc_logo_image_id
request_params.description: Image_id  of logo for  pc client,please input hashcode of this picture.

children.description: Image id of brand registration certificate image , max input num of file = 1 , each file's length<=498
children.name: file_hash

request_params.description: The link to brand registration website, It is mandatory when brand name hit blacklist.len<254
request_params.name: brand_registration_website

value.brand_description: Our mission is what drives us to do everything possible to expand human potential. We do that by creating groundbreaking sport innovations, by making our products more sustainably, by building a creative and diverse global team and by making a positive impact in communities where we live and work
value.additional_information: additional notes or comment can seller can add

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/product/register_brand?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "additional_information": "additional notes or comment can seller can add",
    "app_logo_image_id": "6373157f9408b42c8aacda1d63d3a209",
    "brand_country": "US",
    "brand_description": "Our mission is what drives us to do everything possible to expand human potential. We do that by creating groundbreaking sport innovations, by making our products more sustainably, by building a creative and diverse global team and by making a positive impact in communities where we live and work",
    "brand_website": "www.nike.com",
    "category_list": [
        16521,
        16522
    ],
    "original_brand_name": "Nike",
    "pc_logo_image_id": "6373157f9408b42c8aacda1d63d3a209",
    "product_image": {
        "image_id_list": [
            "-"
        ]
    }
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

add the licenses and brand_registration_website request parameters
